name: Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken wings in a paper bag with flour, salt, and pepper. Shake until well coated.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or large pot to 350°F (175°C).
3. Remove chicken from the bag and shake off excess flour. Fry until golden brown, about 4-5 minutes per side.
4. In a small saucepan, melt butter with crushed red pepper and cayenne over medium heat until bubbling. Stir in hot pepper sauce.
5. Drain fried wings on paper towels. Toss in the spicy butter sauce.
6. Serve with blue cheese dressing and celery sticks. Makes 4 servings.
